case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. MATTHEW MAES

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-28-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MAES, MATTHEW SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-01-2020
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-28-2020 CONTINUED TO OCT-27-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100108567)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-27-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
